templates.name: 2-Step Tripwire / Free-Plus-Shipping Funnel
templates.summary: Acquire a NEW buyer at zero net cost on cold traffic by leading with an irresistibly cheap or free front-end (physical product, sample, or low-cost info product) where the customer pays only shipping. The 2-step order form captures the lead on step 1 (abandoned-cart recovery) before billing on step 2. All OTO/downsell revenue is pure profit.
goals: Convert cold/paid traffic into first-time buyers cheaply
Build a buyer list (not just a lead list)
Acquire customers at break-even or better via order bump + OTOs
Liquidate ad spend so backend revenue is profit
signals: Client has a cheap/physical front-end product or sample to give away
Goal stated as 'get customers' or 'self-liquidate ad spend', not 'collect leads'
Cold paid traffic is the intended source
There is a clear backend value ladder to upsell into
antiSignals: Front-end price is $27-$97 with margin goals -> route to Self-Liquidating Offer (SLO) Funnel
The free item is a book at just-pay-shipping -> route to Book Funnel
No payment is collected at all (email only) -> route to a Lead/Squeeze Funnel
Recurring subscription is the core offer -> route to Membership/Continuity Funnel

templates.name: Book Funnel
templates.summary: A free-plus-shipping physical book offer where the prospect pays only shipping (typically $7.95). The book acquires a buyer-quality lead; an order bump on the payment step and two OTOs after purchase cover ad costs and generate profit. The confirmation page delivers high-value bonus training that bridges to a higher-priced backend offer. Use when the client has (or can produce) a book and wants to build a premium buyer list while liquidating ad spend.
goals: Acquire buyer-quality leads via a free book (pay shipping only)
Establish the author as the expert / Attractive Character
Cover ad costs with the order bump + 2 OTOs
Bridge new buyers into a higher-priced backend offer
signals: Client has or is writing a book / printed asset
Goal is a premium buyer list + authority positioning
Cold paid traffic with a defined backend (course/coaching/event)
Willing to ship a physical product for the cost of shipping
antiSignals: Front end is a non-book digital product $27-$97 -> SLO Funnel
Front end is a non-book physical sample -> 2-Step Tripwire
No physical/printed asset, just a lead magnet -> Lead Magnet Funnel (lead group)
Recurring subscription is the core -> Membership/Continuity

templates.name: Daily Deal Funnel
templates.summary: A deeply discounted front-end offer used to acquire new customers (the Groupon/LivingSocial model). The thank-you page encourages buyers to SHARE the same deal with their network, creating built-in viral distribution. Use when the goal is fast customer acquisition + organic spread from an irresistible, time-boxed discount.
goals: Acquire many new customers fast with a deep discount
Trigger viral/word-of-mouth distribution from buyers
Move excess inventory or fill capacity (local service)
Seed a buyer list cheaply with urgency
signals: Offer is a steep/limited-time discount, not a free sample
Goal includes sharing / referral / viral spread
Time-boxed urgency is core to the pitch
Local service or product with capacity to fill
antiSignals: Free/just-shipping front end -> 2-Step Tripwire
Recurring subscription -> Membership/Continuity
Long convincing required -> VSL or Sales Letter Funnel
Free physical book -> Book Funnel

templates.name: Membership / Continuity Funnel
templates.summary: Sells access to a recurring subscription — membership site, SaaS, newsletter, or info-product continuity. Often led in with a free trial, $1 trial, or free-plus-shipping box. Stick rate improves when deployed as a SECOND funnel after buyers have already bonded with the Attractive Character. A VSL or sales page sells the subscription; member account creation happens on the thank-you page with an automated content drip.
goals: Sell recurring/subscription access (monthly or annual)
Add predictable recurring revenue (MRR) to the value ladder
Convert existing buyers into members (stick rate)
Onboard members and drip content automatically
signals: Offer is recurring (monthly/annual) rather than one-time
Client wants MRR / predictable revenue
There is gated content, software, or a community to deliver continuously
Best deployed to an audience that already bought / already bonded
antiSignals: One-time digital product -> SLO or Sales Letter / VSL Funnel
Free/just-shipping physical front end -> 2-Step Tripwire (can lead INTO continuity)
Deeply discounted one-time deal -> Daily Deal Funnel
High-ticket application/coaching -> Application Funnel (other group)

templates.name: Self-Liquidating Offer (SLO) Funnel
templates.summary: A front-end product priced $27-$97 designed specifically to BREAK EVEN on cold ad spend so all upsell revenue becomes pure profit. A squeeze/lead page leads to the core product via a VSL or long-form sales letter, with an order-form bump and an OTO sequence. Distinct from the tripwire in price point and margin structure: SLO carries real margin and aims to recover the full cost of acquiring a customer at the order page.
goals: Recover 100% of cold ad spend on the front-end before any follow-up runs
Sell a $27-$97 info/digital product to cold traffic
Build a buyer list while breaking even
Fund unlimited paid-traffic scaling
signals: Front-end price stated in the $27-$97 band
Explicit goal of breaking even on ad spend / 'pay for itself'
Digital/info product (course, toolkit, templates) rather than a free sample
Cold paid traffic with a defined upsell ladder
antiSignals: Front-end is free/just-shipping -> route to 2-Step Tripwire/Free-Plus-Shipping
A video alone makes the whole sale -> consider VSL Funnel as the order page modality
The core product is a recurring subscription -> Membership/Continuity
The front-end is a physical book at just-shipping -> Book Funnel

templates.name: AutoWebinar Funnel (Evergreen Webinar)
templates.summary: Use to scale a webinar that has ALREADY converted live — run the recording evergreen 24/7 with just-in-time sessions, watch-time segmentation, and an automated cart-close per registrant.
goals: Sell the same offer continuously without presenting live each time
Scale paid cold/warm traffic to a hands-off selling event
Segment and follow up by watch behavior (watched-to-end, left-early, no-show)
signals: A live Perfect Webinar has already proven conversion
Client wants hands-off, always-on sales
High, steady traffic volume to feed sessions
Wants per-lead deadline funnels rather than one global cart close
antiSignals: No proven live webinar yet (run live first)
Offer/price changes frequently (evergreen recording goes stale)
One-time event with fixed date (use Live Webinar)
scripts: Presentation = the proven Perfect Webinar recording (Intro → 3 Secrets → Stack → Close) — do NOT rewrite a converting recording
Registration + per-lead urgency = Copywriting Secrets
Segmented follow-up = 3 Closes (emotion/logic/fear) tied to the evergreen deadline
Order page recap = Star/Story/Solution

pageStructure.purpose: Register the visitor and offer immediate or near-future session times.
blocks: Curiosity Big-Promise headline (same as proven live)
Session-time picker: next just-in-time sessions + 'watch the one starting in 15 min'

pageStructure.purpose: Confirm the chosen session and maximize show-up rate.
Play the evergreen recording as a simulated-live event and track watch time.
blocks: Embedded recording (YouTube/Vimeo/auto-webinar platform) running as simulated live
Buy button revealed at the same timestamp the Stack begins

pageStructure.purpose: Present the order with the Stack and a per-lead deadline.
blocks: Evergreen deadline countdown (per-lead, e.g. 48h from registration)

pageStructure.purpose: Run different follow-up per watch behavior to recover non-buyers.
blocks: 3 Closes follow-up (emotion → logic → fear) tied to the per-lead deadline
